mapper.sql: rule_code, rule_desc, rule_type, rule_ass_flag, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, warehouse_type_code, rule_qty_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config (rule_code, rule_desc, rule_type, rule_ass_flag, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, warehouse_type_code, rule_qty_flag) values (#{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config
rule_code,
rule_desc,
rule_type,
rule_ass_flag,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
warehouse_type_code,
rule_qty_flag,
#{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config
rule_code = #{record.ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rule_desc = #{record.ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rule_type = #{record.ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rule_ass_flag = #{record.ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_type_code = #{record.warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rule_qty_flag = #{record.ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config set rule_code = #{record.ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rule_desc = #{record.ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rule_type = #{record.ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rule_ass_flag = #{record.ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_type_code = #{record.warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rule_qty_flag = #{record.ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config
rule_desc = #{ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rule_type = #{ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rule_ass_flag = #{ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_type_code = #{warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rule_qty_flag = #{ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where rule_code = #{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_rule_config set rule_desc = #{ruleDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rule_type = #{ruleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rule_ass_flag = #{ruleAssFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_type_code = #{warehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rule_qty_flag = #{ruleQtyFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where rule_code = #{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
